q9.query: How to enable versioning in S3
q9.answer:
To enable versioning in an S3 bucket:

1. Sign in to the AWS Management Console and open the Amazon S3 console at https://console.aws.amazon.com/s3.
2. Navigate to the bucket for which you want to enable versioning.
3. Choose the **Properties** tab.
4. Under **Bucket Versioning**, choose **Edit**.
5. Select the **Enabled** option to enable S3 Versioning for the bucket.
6. Save your changes.

This will enable S3 Versioning, and all objects added to the bucket will receive a unique version ID.
